title: Refactor DIP-005 (DIP): Direct instantiation of Subplots manager.

detected_issue.reasoning: The Plotter class directly instantiates the Subplots class. While both are internal to the new objects interface, this direct creation prevents the inversion of control that would allow different subplot strategies to be injected into the compilation engine.

fix_logic.summary: Inject Subplots factory into Plotter to decouple from concrete Subplots class.
fix_logic.rationale: By allowing the Subplots manager to be provided (or defaulting to the concrete class), we remove the hard-coded dependency in Plotter._setup_figure, adhering to the Dependency Inversion Principle.

changes.search_text:
self._subplots = subplots = Subplots(subplot_spec, facet_spec, pair_spec)

        # --- Figure initialization
changes.replace_text:
self._subplots = subplots = self._subplots_cls(subplot_spec, facet_spec, pair_spec)

        # --- Figure initialization
